title: BNY Mellon 2023 Annual Meeting of Stockholders
text: NEW YORK , March 30, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- BNY Mellon (NYSE: BK) will hold the 2023 Annual Meeting of Stockholders at 240 Greenwich Street, New York, New York 10286 on Wednesday, April 12, 2023, at 9:00 a.m. ET. The Notice of Annual Meeting and Proxy Statement was made available on March 1, 2023.

title: 7 March Buffett Dividend Dogs To Buy And One To Watch
text: This Buffett holdings list from Kiplinger first appeared 2/14/23 on line. YCharts and Dogs of The Dow both track this Buffett/Berkshire batch. Here is your update from 3/23/23 YCharts data. 33 of 49 current Berkshire-Hathaway-owned-stocks pay dividends. As of 3/23/23, the top-ten ranged 3.42%-5.48% by annual-yield and 47 of 49 ranged -1.94% to 90.81% per broker-estimated target-price-upsides.

title: Here's Why The Bank of New York Mellon Corporation (BK) Is a Great 'Buy the Bottom' Stock Now
text: The Bank of New York Mellon Corporation (BK) appears to have found support after losing some value lately, as indicated by the formation of a hammer chart. In addition to this technical chart pattern, strong agreement among Wall Street analysts in revising earnings estimates higher enhances the stock's potential for a turnaround in the near term.

title: Factbox: Warren Buffett's investments in financial firms
text: Berkshire Hathaway's Warren Buffett has been in discussions with senior Biden administration officials about the banking crisis, leading some to speculate that Buffett would consider investing in the sector following the collapse of Silicon Valley Bank.

title: The Bank of New York Mellon Corporation (BK) Could Be a Great Choice
text: Dividends are one of the best benefits to being a shareholder, but finding a great dividend stock is no easy task. Does The Bank of New York Mellon Corporation (BK) have what it takes?

title: Stocks of 11 banks that pumped $30 billion into First Republic Bank all lower premarket
text: The stocks of the 11 banks that contributed $30 billion in uninsured deposits to embattled lender First Republic Bank on Thursday were all lower in premarket trade Friday, amid concerns the unprecedented action had failed to prop up the regional bank's stock. First Republic Bank stock FRC, +9.98% was down 4% premarket, after it said it would suspend its dividend to conserve cash.

title: Even Warren Buffett Loses Billions On 4 Bank Stocks
text: The banking crisis is costing most S&P 500 investors serious money. Even Warren Buffett is taking his lumps.

title: JPMorgan, BofA, 9 Other Banks Deposit $30 Billion in First Republic
text: Eleven large U.S. banks are making uninsured deposits totaling $30 billion into First Republic Bank.

title: Eleven U.S. banks pledge $30 billion for First Republic
text: Bank of America BAC , Citigroup C , JPMorgan Chase JPM and Wells Fargo WFC said Thursday they are each making $5 billion uninsured deposits as part of a $30 billion package from 11 banks into First Republic Bank FRC. The move “reflects their confidence in First Republic and in banks of all sizes,” the banks said in a joint statement.

title: 3 Major Regional Banks Worth a Look Despite SVB, SBNY Collapse
text: The contagion risk arising from bank runs, worsening asset quality and recession expectations will hurt Zacks Major Regional Banks' near-term performance. Yet, industry players like JPM, BAC & BK are worth a look on restructuring and digitization initiatives.

title: Ignore SVB Fiasco, These 3 Banks Are on a Strong Footing
text: Even though SVB's debacle rattled the U.S. banking sector, The Bank of New York Mellon (BK), Northeast Community Bancorp (NECB) and SB Financial Group (SBFG) remain solid investment choices.

title: BNY Mellon is Accepting Applications for Grants on Behalf of the Ernest Q. Johnson Trust to Benefit Canonsburg Youth
text: PITTSBURGH , March 15, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- BNY Mellon Wealth Management is accepting applications for grants from the Ernest Q. Johnson Trust to benefit youth from Canonsburg, PA, a suburb of Pittsburgh.

title: Report: 10 Banks Are Most Exposed To Uninsured Deposits
text: High levels of uninsured deposits helped do in Silicon Valley Bank and Signature Bank. But it turns out they're not alone.

title: The Bank of New York Mellon Corporation (BK) Upgraded to Strong Buy: Here's Why
text: The Bank of New York Mellon Corporation (BK) might move higher on growing optimism about its earnings prospects, which is reflected by its upgrade to a Zacks Rank #1 (Strong Buy).
